title: euthamia graminifolia subsp. nuttallii
intro: Euthamia graminifolia subsp. nuttallii, also known as Nuttall's goldenrod, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Nuttall's goldenrod include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns.
